title: papaver ouvrardianum
intro: Papaver ouvrardianum, also known as the Shirley poppy, is a species of poppy that belongs to the Papaveraceae family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Papaver ouvrardianum include reducing pain and inflammation, improving sleep quality, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
